query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "agents' last exam" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) by measuring the same core mechanism (autonomous agent development and recursive self-improvement) and variables (agent performance, robustness, and alignment deficits) that the user's question regarding "Agents' Last Exam" and extending computer science agent research targets. It provides the canonical empirical baseline and evaluation framework for the specific domain of agents building agents, which is the direct subject of the user's inquiry.
